body:
## Summary

The Codex review lane appears to be hanging in `acpx` rather than completing/failing cleanly. This is separate from the Claude `permissions.defaultMode: "auto"` / `acpx@0.4.0` session setup failure tracked in #69.

## Evidence

Current run:
- https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/actions/runs/25175391392/job/73805965148
- Job: `review (codex, approve-all, xhigh, codex-review, codex-review)`
- Status is still `in_progress`; step `Run codex review` started at `2026-04-30T15:53:29Z` and has not completed.
- Logs are not yet downloadable via the Actions job log API (`BlobNotFound` while in progress), so we cannot see a terminal error from this run.

Previous run with the same PR/review lane:
- https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/actions/runs/25174733546/job/73803608373
- The Codex lane started normally and reached:

```text
{"msg":"Envelope parsed","route":"review","target":"pull_request#66","thread_key":"self-evolving/repo:pull_request:66:review:codex-review"}
{"msg":"Prompt rendered", ...}
{"msg":"Running acpx","agent":"codex","route":"review","permission_mode":"approve-all"}
```

- It never logged `acpx completed`.
- It was later cancelled:

```text
##[error]The operation was canceled.
Terminate orphan process: pid (...) (codex-acp)
```

For comparison, an earlier Codex review on PR #66 did complete successfully in ~2m40s:
- https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/actions/runs/25174163038/job/73801548334
- It logged `acpx completed` with `exit_code:0` and uploaded `codex-review-66`.

## Notes

This failure mode differs from #69:
- Claude failure: deterministic setup error before agent run (`Invalid permissions.defaultMode: auto.` through old ACP adapter).
- Codex failure: `acpx` starts but appears to hang with no completion/log artifact, blocking review synthesis.

There is also a repeated non-fatal thread state warning:

```text
Failed to update thread state (pre-run)
remote: Permission to self-evolving/repo.git denied to github-actions[bot].
```

That warning occurs on both successful and stuck runs, so it may not be the direct cause, but it makes diagnosis and continuity weaker.

## Suggested fixes / hardening

- Add an explicit timeout around `run-agent-task` / `acpx` invocations so a hung Codex ACP process fails visibly instead of leaving the workflow in progress indefinitely.
- Persist partial raw stdout/stderr/session logs or heartbeat output while the agent is running, so in-progress hangs are diagnosable.
- Investigate whether Codex continuation for `pull_request-66-review-codex-review` can wedge when reusing/continuing the same lane after a prior successful review.
- Fix the thread-state push auth warning separately so continuation state is reliable.
title: Codex review lane can hang in acpx and block synthesis
